channel.title: Redmi Note 12 Turbo MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Redmi Note 12 Turbo MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.4.0.VMRCNXM Fastboot update for Redmi Note 12 Turbo China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Redmi Note 12 Turbo China

Codename: marble

Version: OS3.0.4.0.VMRCNXM | 15.0

Size: 7.9 GB

MD5: 0bddca98c4e3a2376b9d07d783cebb74

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to February 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
